zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Grey於1270年出生在英國賀福爾維爾頓時，她的父親Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton30歲，母親Lady Maud de Longchamp31歲。她於大約1288年與John de Moels 1st Baron Moels在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1298年在英國薩默塞特馬波頓享年28歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特馬波頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Grey于1270年出生在英国賀福爾維爾頓时，她的父亲Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton30岁，母亲Lady Maud de Longchamp31岁。她于大约1288年与John de Moels 1st Baron Moels在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1298年在英国薩默塞特馬波頓享年28岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特馬波頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Grey was born in 1270, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, her father, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, was 30 and her mother, Lady Maud de Longchamp, was 31. She married John de Moels 1st Baron Moels about 1288, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1298, in Maperton, Somerset, England, at the age of 28, and was buried in Maperton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Grey est née en 1270, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud de Longchamp, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John de Moels 1st Baron Moels environ 1288, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1298, à Maperton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Maperton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Grey 1270 in Wilton, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton 30 und ihre Mutter Lady Maud de Longchamp 31. Sie hat um 1288 in England John de Moels 1st Baron Moels geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1298 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Maperton, Somerset, England und wurde in Maperton, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Grey è nata il nel 1270 nel Wilton, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Lady Maud de Longchamp, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato John de Moels 1st Baron Moels circa 1288, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1298, nel Maperton, Somerset, England, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolta a Maperton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de Greyが1270年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wiltonは30歳，母Lady Maud de Longchampは31歳であった。約1288年にイギリスでJohn de Moels 1st Baron Moelsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1298年にイギリスソメルセトマペルトンで28歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトマペルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Grey(이)가 1270년 영국 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Maud de Longchamp(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1288년 영국에서 John de Moels 1st Baron Moels(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 영국 서머세트 마퍼턴에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 마퍼턴에 묻혔다.

mn.North Cadbury, Somerset, England: North Cadbury, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Grey nasceu em 1270, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Maud de Longchamp, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com John de Moels 1st Baron Moels aproximadamente 1288, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1298, em Maperton, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 28 anos, e foi sepultada em Maperton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Grey родилась в 1270 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud de Longchamp, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Moels 1st Baron Moels около 1288 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1298 г. в местности мапиртон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности мапиртон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Grey nació en 1270, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald de Grey 1st Baron Grey de Wilton, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Maud de Longchamp, tenía 31 años. Se casó con John de Moels 1st Baron Moels aproximadamente 1288, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1298, en Maperton, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultada en Maperton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
